class.name: JustAMCPToolExecutor
class.brief_description: Executes standardized MCP tool requests dynamically on the engine's tools ecosystem.
class.description: This node bridges the incoming Model Context Protocol command schemas and securely delegates them to specialized tool processors like [JustAMCPSceneTools] and [JustAMCPResourceTools].

method.name: execute_tool
method.description: Dynamically routes the [param tool_name] payload alongside its [param args] directly to the appropriate engine capability toolkit.

method.name: get_tool_schemas
method.description: Returns a structured array of active JSON schemas representing the required parameters for every initialized MCP tool.

method.name: set_test_scene_root
method.description: Overrides the runtime's default scene root retrieval by statically assigning a mock or specific root [Node]. Specifically used to simulate active scenes during headless unit testing.
